# MCP Tool Registry Context

This file provides context for LLMs to understand the tools available in the registry.
The registry contains 48 tools for Model Context Protocol.

## Featured Tools
- accessibility-suite
- codeteam

## Bundles
- core: Essential utilities (start here)
- agents: Autonomous agent frameworks
- ops: DevOps and infrastructure management
- evaluation: Benchmarking and testing tools

## Tool Index
- **accessibility-suite**: Unified monorepo for accessibility testing, evidence generation, and WCAG compliance tooling (Tags: accessibility, compliance, monorepo, wcag)
- **ally-demo-python**: Python demonstration of accessibility framework capabilities (Tags: accessibility, demo, python)
- **aspire-ai**: Goal-oriented framework for running and evaluating AI workflows over time (Tags: evaluation, experimentation, metrics)
- **audiobooker**: Audio book generation and management system (Tags: audio, ebook, generation)
- **backpropagate**: Structured feedback loops for improving AI behavior through iteration (Tags: evaluation, feedback, iteration)
- **brain-dev**: MCP server for AI-powered code analysis — test generation, security audits, refactoring suggestions (Tags: ai, code-analysis, mcp-server, testing)
- **claim-ledger**: Scientific claim provenance and verification ledger (Tags: cryptography, dotnet, provenance)
- **claude-collaborate**: Collaboration primitives for multi-agent and human-in-the-loop Claude workflows (Tags: agents, claude, collaboration)
- **code-covered**: Coverage visualization and reporting tool (Tags: coverage, testing, visualization)
- **codeclone-suite**: Deterministic code coverage analysis as a protocol — CLI engine and editor extensions (Tags: coverage, monorepo, protocol)
- **codecomfy-vscode**: VS Code extension for code analysis and coverage display (Tags: coverage, extension, vscode)
- **codeteam**: Legacy code analysis CLI (see codeteam-suite) (Tags: cli, code-analysis, legacy)
- **codeteam-suite**: Code analysis protocol and tools — CLI engine with editor extensions (Tags: code-analysis, monorepo, protocol)
- **comfy-headless**: Run ComfyUI workflows without the UI — headless execution for automation (Tags: automation, comfyui, headless, image)
- **context-window-manager**: Deterministic tools for shaping and allocating LLM context windows (Tags: context, memory, rag, tokens)
- **control-room**: Dashboard and monitoring for MCP tool ecosystems (Tags: admin, dashboard, monitoring)
- **creator-ledger**: Creator attestation proofs and authorship verification (Tags: attestation, dotnet, provenance)
- **file-compass**: Deterministic file-system navigation and inspection for large repos (Tags: filesystem, navigation, search)
- **flexiflow**: Flexible workflow automation framework (Tags: automation, framework, workflow)
- **headless-wheel-builder**: CLI-first build/validate/release tooling for Python wheels and sdists (Tags: packaging, python, release, wheels)
- **homebrew-core**: Homebrew formulae for mcp-tool-shop packages (Tags: homebrew, macos, packaging)
- **integradio**: Structure layer for building maintainable Gradio apps (UI + execution separation) (Tags: framework, gradio, ui)
- **ledger-suite**: Unified monorepo for cryptographic provenance ledgers — ClaimLedger and CreatorLedger (Tags: cryptography, dotnet, monorepo, provenance)
- **mcp-docs**: Official website and documentation for MCP Tool Shop (Tags: documentation, organization, website)
- **mcp-examples**: Example workspaces and templates for MCP tools (Tags: examples, mcp, templates)
- **mcp-stress-test**: Load and stress testing utilities for MCP servers and tool ecosystems (Tags: concurrency, load-testing, performance)
- **mcpt**: MCP Tool Shop command-line interface and utilities (Tags: cli, mcp, tools)
- **next-gallery**: Windows desktop image gallery application (Tags: desktop, gallery, images, windows)
- **nexus-suite**: Governance, attestation, and routing infrastructure for MCP tool ecosystems (Tags: attestation, governance, monorepo, routing)
- **pathway**: Python journey engine for workflow progression tracking (Tags: journey, python, workflow)
- **payroll-engine**: Comprehensive payroll processing and SaaS platform (Tags: hr, payroll, saas)
- **prov-engine-js**: JavaScript/TypeScript provenance and traceability engine (Tags: provenance, traceability, typescript)
- **runforge-desktop**: Windows desktop application for AI workflow execution (Tags: ai, desktop, windows, workflow)
- **runforge-vscode**: VS Code extension for AI workflow execution (Tags: ai, extension, vscode, workflow)
- **stresskit-mcp**: MCP stress testing toolkit with configurable load patterns (Tags: load, mcp, stress-testing)
- **synthesis**: Composable tool framework for building complex AI workflows (Tags: composition, tools, workflow)
- **tool-compass**: Discovery, classification, and ranking utilities for MCP-compatible tools (Tags: catalog, discovery, ranking)
- **tool-scan**: Static inspection utilities for MCP tools and repositories (Tags: inspection, security, static-analysis)
- **training-studio**: TensorFlow.js ML bundle validator with security-first design and zero code execution (Tags: ml, security, tensorflowjs, validation)
- **venvkit**: Python virtual environment diagnostics and utilities (Tags: diagnostics, python, venv)
- **voice-soundboard**: TTS and audio generation with voice cloning support (Tags: audio, cloning, tts, voice)
- **websketch-cli**: Command-line interface for web component analysis (Tags: analysis, cli, web)
- **websketch-demo**: Interactive demo showcasing WebSketch capabilities (Tags: demo, visualization, web)
- **websketch-extension**: Browser extension for web page analysis and code generation (Tags: analysis, browser, extension)
- **websketch-ir**: Intermediate representation library for web component analysis (Tags: core, ir, library)
- **websketch-mcp**: MCP server for AI-assisted web analysis (Tags: ai, mcp-server, web)
- **winget-pkgs**: Windows Package Manager manifests for mcp-tool-shop packages (Tags: packaging, windows, winget)
- **witness**: Attestation witness and verification tooling (Tags: attestation, security, verification)
